# Data Model: Multiplayer Collaborative Globe Sessions
*Generated by /speckit-plan — 2026-05-15*

---

## Entities

### User
Persistent identity created on first OAuth sign-in. Stored in Firebase Auth user record.

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | string | Firebase UID |
| displayName | string | User-set, 1–32 chars |
| avatarUrl | string | URL to avatar image |
| oauthProvider | 'google' \| 'github' \| 'discord' \| 'apple' | Provider used to sign in |
| createdAt | timestamp | First sign-in time |

**Validation**: `displayName` must be non-empty and ≤32 characters. `avatarUrl` must be a valid URL or empty string (uses initials fallback).

---

### Lobby
Ephemeral session container. Lives in signaling server memory only. Destroyed when `memberIds` becomes empty.

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | string | UUID v4 |
| code | string | 6-character alphanumeric join code (private lobbies) |
| hostPeerId | string | Current host's connection ID |
| isPublic | boolean | Visible in lobby browser when true |
| isLocked | boolean | Blocks new joins when true |
| memberIds | string[] | Ordered list of connected peer IDs, max 6 |
| createdAt | timestamp | Server creation time |

**State transitions**:
```
[empty] → active (first member joins / lobby created)
active → locked (host sets isLocked = true)
locked → active (host sets isLocked = false)
active/locked → [dissolved] (last member leaves — all annotations discarded)
```

**Host promotion**: When host disconnects, `hostPeerId` is reassigned to `memberIds[1]` (next in join order) before the disconnecting peer's cleanup completes. The outgoing host broadcasts full annotation state to all peers first.

---

### LobbyMember
Transient per-connection record. Lives for the duration of a peer's connection to a lobby.

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| peerId | string | WebSocket connection ID (server-assigned UUID) |
| userId | string | Firebase UID (from validated token) |
| displayName | string | Snapshot from User at join time |
| avatarUrl | string | Snapshot from User at join time |
| joinedAt | timestamp | Connection time |
| isHost | boolean | True for exactly one member per lobby |

---

### Annotation
Ephemeral collaborative map object. Lives in the host's memory and each peer's local state. Discarded on lobby dissolution.

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | string | UUID v4, client-generated |
| annotationType | 'stroke' \| 'line' \| 'circle' \| 'rectangle' \| 'pin' | Drawing tool type |
| geometry | AnnotationGeometry | Type-specific coordinate data (see below) |
| label | string? | Optional text label (pins and shapes) |
| color | string | CSS hex color, author-chosen |
| authorPeerId | string | Peer who created it |
| createdAt | timestamp | Client creation time |

**Geometry types**:
```typescript
// stroke: ordered sequence of lon/lat pairs (freehand path)
type StrokeGeometry = { points: [number, number][] };

// line: two endpoints
type LineGeometry = { start: [number, number]; end: [number, number] };

// circle: center + radius in km
type CircleGeometry = { center: [number, number]; radiusKm: number };

// rectangle: southwest + northeast corners
type RectGeometry = { sw: [number, number]; ne: [number, number] };

// pin: single point + label
type PinGeometry = { point: [number, number] };
```

---

### PresenceState
Real-time per-peer camera position. Never persisted — broadcast over unreliable data channel at 5–10hz, read from last-received value.

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| peerId | string | Sender peer ID |
| longitude | number | Degrees |
| latitude | number | Degrees |
| altitude | number | Meters above ellipsoid |
| heading | number | Radians |
| pitch | number | Radians |
| roll | number | Radians |
| pilotPeerId | string? | Non-null when this peer is in pilot mode |
| timestamp | number | `Date.now()` at send time |

---

### ChatMessage
Ephemeral text message. Lives in each peer's local message list for the lobby session only.

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | string | UUID v4, client-generated |
| authorPeerId | string | Sender's peer ID |
| displayName | string | Snapshot of author display name |
| text | string | Message content, max 500 chars |
| timestamp | number | `Date.now()` at send time |

---

### TurnCredentials
Ephemeral TURN server credentials issued by the signaling server on lobby join/create.

| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| urls | string[] | TURN server URLs |
| username | string | Ephemeral username (TTL:userId format) |
| credential | string | HMAC-SHA1 of username with shared secret |
| ttl | number | Seconds until expiry (default 3600) |

---

## Relationships

```
User ──< LobbyMember >── Lobby
                │
                └── PresenceState (1:1, real-time)

Lobby ──< Annotation (N, ephemeral)
Lobby ──< ChatMessage (N, ephemeral)
Lobby ──1 TurnCredentials (issued at join, not stored)
```

---

## In-Memory State (Signaling Server)

The signaling server holds no persistent state. All state is in two maps:

```typescript
// Active lobbies
lobbies: Map<lobbyId, {
  lobby: Lobby,
  members: Map<peerId, LobbyMember>,
  sockets: Map<peerId, WebSocket>
}>

// Reverse lookup: which lobby is this peer in?
peerLobby: Map<peerId, lobbyId>
```

On process restart, all state is lost. Clients detect this via WebSocket close and are returned to the lobby browser.
